flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Southeastern Illinois College are 13% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($33.8k vs $38.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southeastern Illinois College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $4.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeastern Illinois College fell 100% between 2011 and 2012 (25.0% → 0.0%).
